name: West Stratton
overview: West Stratton is a small village in the civil parish of Micheldever, in the City of Winchester district, about 8 miles north of Winchester. It lies close to the M3 motorway, which now separates it from its neighbour East Stratton, and is roughly 2 miles from Micheldever station on the South West Main Line.
character: A small, quiet brick-and-thatch village set in arable downland, close to but largely screened from the M3.
amenities: Pubs and facilities in neighbouring East Stratton and Micheldever
No shop or school in the village itself

schools.name: Micheldever CE Primary School
schools.distance: ~1.5 mi south in Micheldever (Dever Valley Federation)

commutes.notes: Nearest station, about 2 miles, with direct trains to London Waterloo (fastest about 1h 2m)
About 8 miles south; the M3 (junction 9) is immediately accessible
Direct from Micheldever on South Western Railway

prices.summary: Stock is mostly period cottages and detached houses in small numbers; very fast road and rail access supports demand, though M3 proximity is a factor for some homes. See the live Rightmove sold-price page for current figures.

thingsToDo: Walking the downland footpaths around the Strattons
Spring bluebells at nearby Micheldever Wood
Exploring Micheldever village and the wider Dever valley
placesToEat: Pubs in neighbouring East Stratton and Micheldever
pros: Exceptionally fast commuting - Micheldever station about 2 miles, and the M3 on the doorstep
cons: Proximity to the M3 brings some traffic noise
Very limited amenities and no village shop or school
whoItSuits: Commuters wanting fast rail from Micheldever and immediate M3 access from a small, quiet downland village.

sources.label: Omio - Micheldever to London Waterloo times
Barton Stacey Primary School (Dever Valley Federation with Micheldever CE)
